x-enumeration-literals.name: Invoice Factor
x-enumeration-literals.description: Invoice factor refers to the party (usually a financial institution or specialized finance company) that purchases or finances invoices (accounts receivable) from a business before the invoices are paid by customers.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Invoice Issuer
x-enumeration-literals.description: Party who creates an invoice and claiming payment for goods or services rendered to the customer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Invoicer
x-enumeration-literals.description: Invoicer is the party (individual, business, or system) that issues an invoice requesting payment for goods or services provided to a customer.
